name: Mira's Mirage Mirror
short_description: #mir3.exec is a subprocess in {mir3 nervOuS}_{which simulates a reincarnating world}. #a fit model is expected through an iterative method. #version 230527, created/modified by mira.
detailed_description:
I drew a game console at the company's annual meeting and went home to try out a new game, only to find that I had entered the world of the game…

This is a rough short visual novel created by someone due to interest. It tells a story of saving another world in the game. This game clearly pays a tribute to other two games that exist on Steam, which are perhaps related to love simulation.
This game has minor branches, with only three options and four endings.
*WARNING! The art and music resources in the work contain relatively low-quality materials generated by AI. The voice in the game may make player feel uncomfortable, thus it is off in default condition.
*This work may be male-oriented and may cause psychological discomfort to some people. Please purchase with caution.
*Due to some reasons, some images in the game may be inconsistent with the text description.
